caption: A news broadcast segment features a group of men sitting behind a long table in a brightly lit indoor setting. The men are dressed in a variety of attire, including white kurtas and vests, and some are seen looking at papers on the table. To the right of the main scene, inset portraits of two men appear with the text "मंत्री संतोष सुमन" and "सुमित कुमार". Red banners dominate the top and bottom of the screen. The top banner reads "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है", and the bottom banner displays "RJD पर नीतीश कुमार का पलटवार" alongside a news logo and a timestamp of "10:05 PM". As the sequence progresses, the labels on the left side of the screen change from "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार" to "डिप्टी CM" and "सब्रत चौधरी", while the camera angle shifts slightly to include a woman wearing a blue sari sitting at the table.
